text.title: Agent Observability Stack Blueprint Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether agent-observability-stack-blueprint applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the agent in production OR pre-prod with paying users?

example.description: When `yes` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
